title: Rosie the Riveter
writer: Dorothy Curnow Handley, Jack Townley, Aleen Leslie
actors: Jane Frazee, Frank Albertson, Barbara Jo Allen
plot: In wartime 1944 in California, defense plant workers Rosalind "Rosie" Warren and her friend Vera Watson must share, on a rotating schedule, the town's last available rental room with Charlie Doran and Kelly Kennedy, who work the o...
